oathauth-recoverycodes-initial-desc:
{{PLURAL
:$1|Lambar farko|Saitin lambobin farko na $1}}, wanda zai ƙare a $2.
oathauth-recoverycodes-initial-intro:
{{PLURAL
:$1|An ƙirƙiri wannan lambar|An aika muku da waɗannan lambobin}} ta imel a matsayin wani ɓangare na buƙatar tabbatar da abubuwa biyu a kan {{SITENAME}}. {{PLURAL:$1|It|They}} za a cire ta atomatik lokacin da kuka kunna wata hanyar tabbatar da abubuwa biyu.
oathauth-auth-ui: Da fatan za a shigar da lamba daga aikace-aikacen tabbatar da abubuwa guda biyu (kamar [https://www.authy.com/ Authy], [https://freeotp.github.io/ FreeOTP], [https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/1066447 Google Authenticator], [https://www.microthentic.software.com/en-security] ko [https://1password.com/ 1Password]).
oathauth-need-full-2fa: A halin yanzu kuna da lambobin dawo da farko na ɗan lokaci kawai. Da fatan za a kunna wata hanyar tabbatar da abubuwa biyu kafin waɗannan lambobin su ƙare.
